# ArchitectureLIVE

> ArchitectureLIVE is a contemporary, sustainability-focused architecture practice based in Haslemere, Surrey. A collaborative team of RIBA Chartered architects working on house extensions, new build homes, education and commercial projects across Surrey, West Sussex, Hampshire and beyond.

Founded in 2009 by Irene Konschill, the practice combines contemporary design with a hands-on, low-energy approach informed by the principles of Passivhaus and BREEAM. From the first conversation to final handover, the people you meet are the people who design and deliver your project. Work has been recognised at the Waverley Design Awards and featured on Channel 4's Extraordinary Extensions.

Contact: info@architecturelive.co.uk, +44 1428 652 018. Studio: Tall Trees, The Cylinders, Fernhurst, Haslemere, Surrey GU27 3EL.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://architecturelive.co.uk/): Overview of the practice and selected work.
- [Projects](https://architecturelive.co.uk/projects/): Full portfolio of extensions, new builds, education and commercial architecture.
- [Studio](https://architecturelive.co.uk/about/): About the practice, the team (Irene Konschill and Jonathan Gratton) and how we work.
- [Contact](https://architecturelive.co.uk/contact/): Address, phone, email and studio location.
- [News](https://architecturelive.co.uk/news/): News, insight and awards.

## Services

- House extensions and remodelling
- New build homes
- Education buildings, including the new-build St Bartholomew's secondary school
- Commercial projects
- Sustainable, low-energy design following Passivhaus and BREEAM principles
- Planning, listed building and conservation work

## More

- [News archive](https://architecturelive.co.uk/news/): Over 100 articles on projects, planning wins, awards and press.
- [Sitemap](https://architecturelive.co.uk/sitemap-index.xml): All indexable URLs.
